items.title: OpenAI introduces GPT-4o mini
items.summary: OpenAI released GPT-4o mini, a smaller and cheaper variant of GPT-4o targeting cost-sensitive production use cases. The model delivers strong performance on text and vision tasks at a fraction of the cost of the full GPT-4o, making it viable for high-volume applications.
